races.name: Bredene Koksijde Classic
races.description: Known as the 'mini Gent-Wevelgem', this 203km Belgian coastal classic features mid-race Kemmelberg ascents and treacherous De Moeren wind sectors before a three-lap finishing circuit in Koksijde — the last sprint test before tomorrow's Milano-Sanremo.

broadcasts.notes: Free to air in Belgium. VRT Max also streams online.
Free to air for French-speaking Belgium.
Discovery+ subscription ~£30.99/month. TNT Sports also broadcasts on TV.
FloBikes subscription required. Monthly ~$39.99 or annual ~$203.88.
Eurosport 2 broadcast from 14:30 CET; stream via HBO Max or Discovery+ depending on country.

data_confidence.notes: Start time, distance and route confirmed via ProCyclingStats and official race website. Broadcast details confirmed via Domestique, TotalVelo, FloBikes and HBO Max listings. Belgian broadcast start times (14:30–14:45 CET) confirmed by two independent French-language sources. No Australian broadcaster identified.

issues: Bredene Koksijde Classic was initially missed — it is a 1.Pro race and sits just below WorldTour level, which may explain why it did not surface in initial WorldTour-focused calendar searches.
No Australian broadcaster found for Bredene Koksijde Classic 2026; SBS typically covers larger Belgian classics but this 1.Pro event appears unconfirmed for AU.
HBO Max stream_url links to the general sports portal rather than a deep-link to today's specific event page as that URL may change on race day; the FloBikes URL is a verified direct event link.
Finish time of 16:46 CET is an estimate from race organisers based on average speed; actual finish may vary by 15–30 minutes depending on race dynamics.
